Agibuild.Fulora
Table of Contents

Interface IAutoUpdateService

Namespace
Agibuild.Fulora
Assembly
Agibuild.Fulora.Core.dll

Provides application auto-update lifecycle: check, download, verify, and apply updates. Registered via Bridge.Expose<IAutoUpdateService>(impl).

public interface IAutoUpdateService

Properties

DownloadProgress

Push event fired during download to report progress.

IBridgeEvent<UpdateDownloadProgress> DownloadProgress { get; }

Property Value

IBridgeEvent<UpdateDownloadProgress>

UpdateAvailable

Push event fired when an update check discovers a new version.

IBridgeEvent<UpdateInfo> UpdateAvailable { get; }

Property Value

IBridgeEvent<UpdateInfo>

Methods

ApplyUpdate()

Applies the downloaded update and restarts the application. Returns Error if no update has been downloaded.

Task<UpdateResult> ApplyUpdate()

Returns

Task<UpdateResult>

CheckForUpdate()

Checks the update feed for a newer version.

Task<UpdateResult> CheckForUpdate()

Returns

Task<UpdateResult>

DownloadUpdate()

Downloads the update package identified by a previous CheckForUpdate() call.

Task<UpdateResult> DownloadUpdate()

Returns

Task<UpdateResult>

GetCurrentVersion()

Returns the currently running application version.

Task<string> GetCurrentVersion()

Returns

Task<string>
